About Me

Building financial
clarity from data.

I'm Ahmed Ali Ghanem, a Senior Accountant based in Riyadh with deep roots in Egyptian and Saudi financial markets. I combine meticulous accounting discipline with a data analyst's mindset to ensure every number tells the right story.

Career Timeline

Professional Experience

5+ years across Saudi Arabia and Egypt, delivering financial excellence in fast-moving environments.

NOV 2022 — PRESENT

Senior Accountant

Mezan Abdulhakeem Al-Odheib Auto Maintenance Co. · Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
Managed credit sales for spare parts across all branches, ensuring timely collections and optimized cash flow cycles through systematic AR tracking.
Led end-to-end reconciliations for "Tamara" BNPL payment gateway, customer statements, and complex suspense accounts — eliminating financial discrepancies.
Conducted daily operational audits of service center logs, verified customer discounts, and enforced strict compliance with internal pricing policies.
Resolved ERP maintenance system issues and provided continuous cashier support to ensure accurate billing, journal entries, and data integrity.
Managed fleet and employee vehicle maintenance settlements with immediate invoicing and full record accuracy.

Accountant

Qurtoba Clothing Factory · Egypt
Managed customer payment follow-ups to ensure liquidity, reducing outstanding receivables and maintaining steady, predictable cash flow.
Recorded daily journal entries and maintained accurate general ledger records, establishing a solid foundation for financial reporting.
Performed periodic customer account reconciliations to resolve discrepancies, ensuring accurate aging reports and dispute resolution.

Case Studies

Key Projects

Real financial challenges, structured solutions, measurable outcomes.

01 / Featured

AR Collections & Tamara Payment Reconciliation System

Designed and managed a comprehensive reconciliation workflow for the "Tamara" BNPL payment gateway — a complex multi-step process prone to timing mismatches and unmatched entries across service centers.

Challenge: High volume of payment entries across branches with frequent suspense account discrepancies.
Solution: Built systematic reconciliation templates in Excel with Power Query transformations to auto-match transactions.
Outcome: Eliminated recurring discrepancies, reduced closing time, and ensured full data integrity.
Advanced Excel Power Query ORACLE ERP Pivot Tables
Business Impact
✓ Zero unresolved suspense accounts at month-end · Full IFRS compliance maintained
💳
02

Credit Sales KPI Dashboard

Built a dynamic Excel dashboard tracking credit sales, collection rates, aging buckets, and cashflow projections across spare parts operations.

Tools: Excel, Power Query, Pivot Tables, Conditional Formatting
Business Impact
✓ Real-time collection visibility · Proactive cash flow management
03

Fleet & Employee Maintenance Settlement Process

Streamlined the end-to-end workflow for fleet and employee vehicle maintenance settlements — from work order validation to immediate invoicing and GL reconciliation.

Tools: ORACLE ERP, Excel, Internal Policy Frameworks
Business Impact
✓ Immediate invoicing accuracy · Reduced settlement disputes
04

Month-End & Year-End Close Optimization

Established standardized monthly closing checklists covering reconciliations, accruals, prepayments, and variance reports — turning a chaotic close into a predictable, auditable process.

Excel ORACLE IFRS
Business Impact
✓ Consistent on-time closing · Audit-ready documentation
05

VAT & Withholding Tax Compliance System

Managed end-to-end VAT filing and WHT compliance through ZATCA, including preparation, calculation, submission, and reconciliation of tax positions.

ZATCA Platform Excel ORACLE ERP
Business Impact
✓ Zero compliance penalties · Clean tax audit trail
